title: crataegus intermedia
intro: Crataegus intermedia, also known as Midland hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Midland hawthorn is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
